title: Cursed MC
description: A cursed new touch for the Game
body:
# Cursed MC – Minecraft, but completely wrong

This texture pack breaks everything – on purpose.
Perfect for anyone who's tired of normal Minecraft or just wants to thoroughly confuse their friends.

## Why use this pack?

Because you're done with beauty and logic.
Because chaos is more fun than order.
Because you want to curse your world in the best possible way.

This pack gives you the ultimate cursed aesthetic – wrong, weird, and absolutely hilarious.

### Warning:

Not recommended for serious survival playthroughs or dedicated builders.
This pack is nonsense – and that’s exactly the point.
